name: dataflou-compositor
description: OSC + MIDI scene compositor - Generative Scene Sequencer (one-button shuffle the scene timeline, 4 presets - Random / Drift / Surprise / Shuffle, bipolar Affinity slider biases toward similar/dissimilar scenes via auto-computed multi-arg scene similarity, per-scene Weight 1-10 + Random Weights button, pool source All / Timeline only with per-scene checklist, min/max scene duration, Use Morph for gliding transitions, 7 MIDI-learnable controls), per-track Default Transition broadcast in the Parameter Inspector, Cell Inspector Transition tooltip, Modulation 2 -> Sequencer (Rate->bpm, Shape->per-mode personality knob, Depth->genAmount generative wildness), drop-focus fixes in Inspector inputs, Hardware Mode session persistence, Modulation 1 relabel, Gesture modulator (XY recorder with live crayon + animated playhead, Wiggle, Forward / Backward / Ping-Pong playback), Stage-2 Address sub-mode, every modulator type usable as Modulation 2, Two-stage modulator with live overlay, Strange Attractor modulator (Lorenz / Aizawa / Thomas / Rössler / Rössler-4D / Lü-4D), Address sequencer mode, Scaling PRE/POST switch, editable pinned values broadcast to clips, per-slot Delay + Variation, Distribution knob on Random + S&H, Hardware Mode (catch-mode soft-takeover from physical controllers), per-sequence-slot duration / follow-action overrides, velocity humanize, modulator-driven note-edge MIDI retrigger, Learned MIDI panel with inline binding editor, drag-reorder scenes, configurable MIDI note window, pitch-snap with 26 scales, native MIDI output, Capture, OSC fan-out forward, per-arg pin + per-arg scaling, undo/redo, save-on-quit, per-session GUI layout, Pool + Scene libraries, 10 sequencer modes, generative system, 10 modulators, rich themes
author: Vincent Fillion
